titleStmt.title: SII 24.34: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 34. (A.R. No. 2 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL, NORTH SIDE.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land by the temple executives to Āṭkoṇḍavilli of Ādaṉūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakkoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putu maṇam puṇarntu matuvaṟaiyiṭṭam vaiyirākarattu vāri Ayirāmunaik kontaḷavaraicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭi porpari naṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pū makaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvaiyiṉ tanimaiyum tavirttu punitaṟṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi taṉṉaṭi Iraṇṭum
ceṅkol ticai toṟuñcella veṇkuṭai Iru nila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanatu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vāḻkaṭaṟṟivān tarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭa taṉ poṉṉakarp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Iṉ ṉāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟppiḻai Ennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetir koṭā veḻ kulattarayar A yil paṭṭakaḷiṟu niraiyīṭṭamum paṭṭamum pariyum viṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟiṉa vīramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cuḻa kantu tānuntātaiyum paṉṉāḷiṭṭap palap palamutukum payantetir māṟina jayap perun tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻi
Damaged.
vicumpeṟa māveṟiya tan varutaniṟṟalaivarek kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟa� ḷḷa siṅhāsanattu tiruttaruḷi Appāl kaliṅka kaikoṇṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyat tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pār toḻac civaniṭattumai yā Avanimuḻutuṭaiyā ḷiruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruntaruḷiya maṅkayar tilatam Eḻicai va yāḷ vāḻi ti viṟṟi ḷiya kovi[rāja]kesaripanmarāna tripuvanacakravarttikaḷ śrī kolottu
Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkadevaṟku śrīkāriyañ ceykira muventaveḷār Ēvalpaṭi śrīvaiṣṇavavāriyam tirukkuruṅkuṭaiyān tiruvaraṅkappiccarum yanum cipaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāva Āritan kecuvantaniiḷañciṅkamum Āritan cirākavan
nūṟṟuvap piriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmika koṇṭa coḻavaḷa nāṭṭu nāṭṭu tta nilam ṭappaḷḷippuṟamāna rājamahentravaḷanāṭṭu viḷat tūr nāṭṭu taṇṭuṟai nilattukkuk kiḻakku taḻuvakkuḻain=tān viḷākam
maṇaliṭṭuk kollaiyāy ttuk kiḻpāṟ kellai Atiya kellai cāttaku melpāṟkel Uḷpaṭṭa nilam Aṟaikkum
Āḻvār cipaṇṭāratte Oṭukkina kācu Arai Ikkācu koṇṭu Innilam Araiyum Ātanūr pāpe Āṭkoṇṭavillik kaṭuttuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Innilam
yyak kaṭava nallātānākavum tiruttaṟṟa nilat cay pokki Iṟai mikuti koṇṭu koṇṭa ceykiṟa tirunantavanam karuṇākaran ce kiṟa vākūr civayiṣṇavadāsarum Ippaṭikku ceyyakkaṭavarāka Aṭuttu vār kanmikaḷom kāñcikkuṟi tiru kuṭi
ci caṭakopanen Itu Enneḻuttu kku nānūṟṟuvappiriya neḻuttu kaṇakku śrīvayiṣṇavappiriyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven
Ivai pattaṅki tiruvaraṅka Ārāmutu puṇṭarīkan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Āritan kecuvan taniiḷañciṅkattin Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kārimāṟaneṉ Ivai EḻuttuThe continuation is not traceable. Araiyum tiruttaṟattirutti paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāle Āṇṭu nālukalamum Aḷakkak kaṭavitallatu tiruvāca li mai Epperpa
Digital edition of SII 24.34 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
